# Specialist Authoring

> **Alias:** `sp` is a shorter alias for `specialists` — `sp run`, `sp list`, `sp feed` etc. work identically.

Project specialists live in two directories under `.specialists/`:

```text
.specialists/default/specialists/   # canonical specialists (copied by init — do not edit)
.specialists/user/specialists/      # your custom specialists (add here)
```

---

## Minimal skeleton

```yaml
specialist:
  metadata:
    name: my-specialist          # kebab-case, required
    version: 1.0.0               # semver, required
    description: "What it does"  # required
    category: analysis           # required (free text)

  execution:
    model: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6   # required — ping before using
    permission_required: READ_ONLY

  prompt:
    task_template: |             # required
      $prompt

      Working directory: $cwd
```

**Common pitfalls:** `task_template` is required. `READ_WRITE` is not a valid permission — use `READ_ONLY`, `LOW`, `MEDIUM`, or `HIGH`.

---

## Complete schema

### `metadata` (required)

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| `name` | string | **yes** | kebab-case: `[a-z][a-z0-9-]*` |
| `version` | string | **yes** | semver: `1.0.0` |
| `description` | string | **yes** | one sentence |
| `category` | string | **yes** | free text |
| `author` | string | no | |
| `created` | string | no | ISO date |
| `updated` | string | no | ISO date — used by staleness detection |
| `tags` | string[] | no | |

### `execution` (required)

| Field | Type | Default | Notes |
|-------|------|---------|-------|
| `model` | string | — | **required** — ping before using |
| `fallback_model` | string | — | must be a different provider |
| `mode` | enum | `auto` | `tool` \| `skill` \| `auto` |
| `timeout_ms` | number | `120000` | ms |
| `stall_timeout_ms` | number | — | kill if no event for N ms |
| `response_format` | enum | `text` | `text` \| `json` \| `markdown` |
| `permission_required` | enum | `READ_ONLY` | `READ_ONLY` \| `LOW` \| `MEDIUM` \| `HIGH` |
| `thinking_level` | enum | — | `off` \| `minimal` \| `low` \| `medium` \| `high` \| `xhigh` |

### `prompt` (required)

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| `task_template` | string | **yes** | `$variable` substitution |
| `system` | string | no | system prompt injected via `--append-system-prompt` |
| `skill_inherit` | string | no | single skill folder/file, injected via `--skill` |
| `output_schema` | object | no | JSON schema for structured output |
| `examples` | array | no | few-shot examples |

### `skills` (optional)

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `paths` | string[] | skill folders or files passed as `pi --skill`; folder loads `SKILL.md` inside |
| `scripts` | array | pre/post scripts or commands — see [Pre/post scripts](#prepost-scripts) |

**Script entry fields:**

| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| `run` | string | **yes** | file path (`./scripts/check.sh`) or shell command (`bd ready`) |
| `phase` | enum | **yes** | `pre` \| `post` |
| `inject_output` | boolean | no (default `false`) | `true` → stdout available as `$pre_script_output` |

`path` is accepted as a deprecated alias for `run`.

### `capabilities` (optional)

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `required_tools` | string[] | pi tools the agent is expected to use (informational) |
| `external_commands` | string[] | CLI binaries validated on `PATH` before run — **hard fail** if missing |

### `communication` (optional)

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `next_specialists` | string \| string[] | specialist(s) to run next, receiving this output as `$previous_result` |

### `validation` (optional)

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `files_to_watch` | string[] | if any file's mtime > `metadata.updated`, specialist is marked STALE |
| `stale_threshold_days` | number | STALE for more than N days → escalates to AGED |

### Top-level fields

| Field | Type | Default | Notes |
|-------|------|---------|-------|
| `output_file` | string | — | write final output to this file path after session completes |
| `beads_integration` | enum | `auto` | `auto` \| `always` \| `never` |

---

## Permission tiers

Controls which `pi --tools` are available to the agent:

| Level | Tools | Use when |
|-------|-------|----------|
| `READ_ONLY` | `read, grep, find, ls` | read-only analysis, no bash |
| `LOW` | `+ bash` | inspect / run commands, no file edits |
| `MEDIUM` | `+ edit` | can edit existing files |
| `HIGH` | `+ write` | full access — can create new files |

---

## Template variables

Always available in `task_template`:

| Variable | Value |
|----------|-------|
| `$prompt` | user prompt passed to the specialist |
| `$cwd` | working directory at invocation |
| `$pre_script_output` | stdout of `pre` scripts with `inject_output: true` |

When invoked via `--bead`:

| Variable | Value |
|----------|-------|
| `$bead_context` | full bead content (replaces `$prompt`) |
| `$bead_id` | the bead ID |

Custom variables can be passed at invocation via `--variables key=value` and accessed as `$key`.

---

## Skills injection

`skills.paths` entries are passed as `pi --skill <path>`. Pi accepts:
- **folder** — loads `SKILL.md` from inside it (conventional)
- **direct file** — loads that file directly

`skill_inherit` (under `prompt:`) works the same way for a single file — Agent Forge compatibility field.

```yaml
skills:
  paths:
    - skills/my-skill/           # folder — pi reads SKILL.md inside
    - ~/.agents/skills/domain/   # user-scope skill
```

---

## Pre/post scripts

`skills.scripts` entries run **locally** before (`pre`) or after (`post`) the agent session. Not inside the agent.

```yaml
skills:
  scripts:
    - run: ./scripts/gather-context.sh  # file path
      phase: pre
      inject_output: true               # stdout → $pre_script_output
    - run: "bd ready"                   # shell command
      phase: pre
      inject_output: true
    - run: ./scripts/cleanup.sh
      phase: post
```

Pre-run validation (before session starts):
- File paths: checked for existence, shebang typos caught and reported as errors
- Shell commands: binary checked on `PATH` — hard fail if not found
- `capabilities.external_commands`: same PATH check

---

## Validation (staleness detection)

```yaml
specialist:
  metadata:
    updated: "2026-03-01"

  validation:
    files_to_watch:
      - src/specialist/schema.ts
    stale_threshold_days: 30
```

| State | Condition |
|-------|-----------|
| `OK` | no watched file changed, or `files_to_watch` / `updated` not set |
| `STALE` | a watched file's mtime is newer than `metadata.updated` |
| `AGED` | STALE + days since `updated` exceeds `stale_threshold_days` |

STALE and AGED warnings appear in `specialists status` and `specialists list`.

---

## Model setup

```bash
specialists models                               # list all models + current assignments
specialists edit <name> --model <value>          # set primary model
specialists edit <name> --fallback-model <value> # set fallback (must be different provider)
specialists edit <name> --model <v> --dry-run    # preview before writing
```

**Rule:** `model` and `fallback_model` must use different providers. Ping before assigning:

```bash
pi --model anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 --print "ping"   # must return "pong"
```

For full model rebalancing workflow, see `config/skills/specialist-author/SKILL.md`.

---

## Scope rules

- **default specialists** — `.specialists/default/specialists/` — copied by `specialists init`, do not edit
- **custom specialists** — `.specialists/user/specialists/` — add yours here, take precedence on name collision
- user-scope discovery (`~/.agents/specialists/`) is deprecated

---
